summary: Retest of the 2 backend bugs from iteration_11. Both bugs are FIXED. Backend: 16/16 pytests pass (up from 13/16). Frontend: biogas slider live update on /buildings/bld_001/potential is now working — moving families slider 10→66 changes biogas headline 2,920→964 m³/yr; waste slider 0.5→2.5 kg/day changes headline to 4,818 m³/yr and daily_organic_waste_kg to 165 kg. Total annual savings strip also updates reactively. Regression endpoints (no overrides + GET /api/admin/audit) confirmed healthy.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py still 3300+ lines — split into routers (admin, audit, sustenance) is overdue but not blocking.

BuildingPotentialPage.js still fires an API call on every slider tick — recommend debouncing 200-300ms or commit-on-release. During testing 60 keystrokes generated ~60 /potential requests; acceptable for now but will be a problem on slower networks.
Public BuildingPotentialPage still calls /api/auth/me (401) and /feature-flags for anonymous users — minor noise.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (biogas slider live update verified end-to-end for both families and waste sliders)

test_credentials: iter10_fe_session for gp@sus10.ai — verified valid via /api/auth/me; no new credentials needed.
seed_data_creation: Pytest run wrote 1 building.reject + 1 building.approve (re-approve) + 1 bulk_approve + 1 bulk_reject + 1 intel.add audit entries for bld_001 (or bld_TEST_doesnotexist for bulk_reject). Building bld_001 left in approved state (test re-approves after reject).
context_for_next_testing_agent:
P1 batch part 1 is fully verified. Both backend bugs from iter11 are fixed:
1) PUT /api/admin/buildings/{id}/reject now records audit with action='building.reject'. Confirmed via GET /api/admin/audit?action=building.reject
2) calculate_full_sustenance_potential now forwards families + waste_kg_per_family_per_day to calculate_biogas_potential. GET /api/buildings/bld_001/potential?families=50&waste_kg_per_family_per_day=1.0 returns daily_organic_waste_kg=50.0, biogas_m3_per_day=4.0, daily_waste_source='user_kitchen_waste'.
Frontend biogas slider live-update works for both families and waste sliders.
Run tests with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://sus10-preview.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/test_p1_audit_and_potential.py -v
rca_of_the_issue: Both fixes confirmed against committed code at /app/backend/server.py (admin_reject_building now calls record_audit with action='building.reject') and /app/backend/services/sustenance_calculator.py (calculate_full_sustenance_potential now passes families + waste_kg_per_family_per_day into calculate_biogas_potential). No remaining issues.
